feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,357Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 55

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin & Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,781Chapters: 13/55Kudos: 82

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon’s protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon’s curse begins to stir — and Uther Pendragon’s madness stands as a warning — Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

entry.title: To Hell with Destiny
entry.summary:
Author: Sephenia

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 470Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Merlin and Arthur could have run away together and been happy but they took too long to figure that out. :(

entry.title: Insanity
entry.summary:
Author: RomaMarufixx

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,887Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 4

Summary: Merlin is a patient in a mental health hospital and Arthur is her doctor. Merlin has feelings for Arthur and Arthur has feelings for Merlin, but the two of them shouldn't be together, with their doctor patient relationship as well as their age gap but after fixing some misunderstandings, is there a way for them to be together? Old work originally posted on FF.net in 2013.

entry.title: You were the one to teach me how to use knives: Vol 5
entry.summary:
Author: Obsessedwithfanfiction

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,210Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 37

Summary: Morgana's memory curse is still in place, but Leon's no longer the only person suspicious of her. Gwen's got a mystery to solve and a long-lost brother to deal with. Morgana's determined to get closer to Merlin again to try and find out how long he's been hiding his magic from her. Meanwhile Merlin's just flattered to be receiving a Lady's attention, though with Gwaine coming back into his life, that might not be the only attention he's receiving. And Arthur's struggling his way back through his character growth and what kind of King he wants to be...

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Pairings are only ordered by their appearance in the story
  • And will be updated as we go

  • I am finally BACK baby!!!
  • In NZ
  • living my best life
  • Do I have a solid internet connection?
  • no!
  • Do I have a job?
  • Nope!
  • Have I finally relaxed maybe a single inch?
  • MAYBE!
  • Am I still obsessed with this ridiculous show and how much they all love each other in new and tragic ways?
  • Hell yes!
  • Fix-It
  • Series 2 onwards rewrite
  • Pls read the other parts first or this will make no sense
  • What if BBC's Merlin had emotional catharsis?
  • And consistency?
  • And a head writer who cared more about all these characters having long conversations with each other
  • Than actually advancing the plot
  • Ofc everyone is still in love with Merlin
  • And also Gwen
  • Guys I hate to jinx it but I think this is finally the part where the title should make sense
  • don't quote me though
  • No beta we die like Uther should have done seasons before he did
  • did ya miss me

entry.title: The Touch Of Love
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,392Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 101

Summary: Merlin's eyes changed when he did magic. He knew that. In the privacy of his own head, Arthur had come to think of that golden gleam as beautiful since he'd discovered the secret of his sorcery. This was different. It crackled like lightning; a storm held in Merlin's gaze. It cast brief light upon his cheekbones, spilling odd shadows across his face. 'What's happening?' 'He is dying,' a woman's voice said, sugar-sweet. 'And he will take you with him, Arthur Pendragon.' --- A routine hunt threatens to become a fatal disaster when Arthur and Merlin are captured and imprisoned in a dungeon used during the Purge. Can they fight their way to freedom, or will Merlin's power be the death of them?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.title: Forever Is My Tomorrow
entry.summary:
Author: Mahogany_Rust

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 443,371Chapters: 46/80Kudos: 1,512

Summary: It had actually been a long time since Hiccup had thought about how he would die.When he was young, every sunrise was another gamble to see if he would get himself eaten by a dragon or somehow manage to fall off one of Berk’s many cliffs.Perhaps Winter would finally choose to break his wiry body with illness or he would catch an unfortunate stray battle axe.Yet here he was, 21, about to die in the wrong place (not a bad age to reach in the Archipelago when you’re Hiccup Haddock, let's be honest). But that was the thing wasn’t it? Hiccup made plenty of marks all in the wrong places. What if one of those marks was in the future? On one unsuspecting spirit’s affections?---- FIMT CINEMATIC TRAILER

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The Bond Series: Season 2: Episode 1 "Home Isn't Home"
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,275Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Change is for the young, they say. Arthur and Merlin struggle to build their dream of Albion while facing old enemies from within, and a new enemy on the horizon threatens to destroy everything. Consequences for a choice made long ago rear. Are they strong enough to stand united, or will they falter?Season 2 of The Bond Series (I have fixed and reposted Season 1- I suggest you read that first, or this season won't make much sense). Note, you'll see each "book" in this season titled as an episode- make's it easier to follow the timeline, I think. For those who wished for less Merlin Whump and more Arthur- I have failed you, deeply :( I did make efforts to respect the "I wish Merlin was conscious more" requests!

entry.title: the ways of the old, old winds blowin' back round
entry.summary:
Author: habituallywastingtime

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,578Chapters: 2/16Kudos: 35

Summary: As a child, Arthur didn’t know why he was kept away from the courtyard.Or why it so often smelt… like that.Until one morning, Sir Kay guided him to the balcony he’d only been allowed on sometimes. Only sometimes, because it looks over the courtyard.His father was waiting for him, holding an arm out to beckon him closer. Arthur rushed in, latching himself onto his father’s side as it was so rarely permitted.There was a crowd below him; he had never seen so many people in one place.There was a pile of wood.He remembers little outside of the way his eyes burned, how he at last understood that smell. He remembers forcing down his supper that night and emptying his stomach in the corridor before he could even reach his room.Now he remembers it all.He can’t feel the bruising stones under his knees, hardly tastes the leftover bile coating his mouth.All he knows is the all-consuming realization that his greatest fear and anguish still holds the throne, even in his heart. sequel to the pale morning sings of forgotten things

entry.title: Three Teardrops
entry.summary:
Author: grlnxtdr29

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,438Chapters: 12/14Kudos: 32

Summary: The Search for the Dragon Eggs continues in this sequel to Of Legends and (Rugby) Kings. Now that Charlie and the Paris Squad are starting to remember their past, it is time to focus on helping the Sorcerer complete his Quest to restore the Dragon Race, and bring Magick back to the world. Along the way, they will encounter old foes, and new ones, while discovering things about themselves they never realized before. There will be memories of Camelot, and perhaps even some surprises along the way!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: New Beginnings
entry.summary:
Author: Moontra992

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,000Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 72

Summary: The final battle is won. Merlin has fulfilled his destiny. He is dropped from the sky into a new time and place and seeks to fit in and to figure out his new destiny - if there is any. He comes across a kind and welcoming family but soon realizes that nothing is quite as it seems...

entry.summary:

entry.title: Those Ocean Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: redamantica

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,473Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 15

Summary: “You need a new partner.” It wasn’t a question. “Are you offering?” Arthur asked. Merlin stepped closer, close enough that Arthur could feel the warmth radiating off him despite the cooling evening air. He extended a hand, pale fingers waiting. “I’m saying,” Merlin said, his voice dropping to something intimate, something just for them, “that if you’re looking for someone to watch your back in the water, someone who won’t let the ocean take you…then I’m your man.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,986,410Chapters: 128/?Kudos: 1,641

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Romance is not dead (if you keep it just yours)
entry.summary:
Author: z2ofus

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,513Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Arthur is hopelessly in love with Merlin as Merlin is. None of them know how the other feels. The knights know better. Arthur opens up to his knights and they encourage him to court with Merlin. Flowers, bad poetry, gifts and very akward compliments.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Would You Stand At My Side
entry.summary:
Author: Noel803

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,762Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 177

Summary: Honestly, Merlin had thought telling Arthur about his magic, and revoking the old laws would be the biggest obstacles to creating Albion. Really that had all been the easy part. After a few teary, but heartfelt conversations Merlin was installed as the new Court Sorcerer and together they set out to unite all the lands in peace. Apparently the biggest setback was proving to be their marriage status or lack-there-of. Who knew so many people cared about whether a king or wizard had a spouse? Well, Arthur has an idea to solve both of their problems, if it doesn’t prove to break Merlin’s heart first. Because how was he supposed to let go after getting a taste of the one thing he’d always wanted, Arthur’s hand in marriage. Or my fake-marriage Valentine’s Day special no one asked me for!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 85,241Chapters: 16/20Kudos: 62

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it. Featuring pervasive passive aggression and a general sense of melancholy, an extended and distinctly non peaceful political process to legalising magic, a not entirely willing family trip to Ealdor, and some foreign diplomatic negotiations somewhat lacking in diplomacy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
